items.line_en: At the doctors.

coach.say: At the doctors.
coach.hint: Chunk it: At the doctors.

items.line_en: Hi. My name is John Burke. I have an appointment to see Dr. Gray.

coach.say: Hi. My name is John Burke. I have an appointment to see Dr. Gray.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi. / My name is John Burke. / I have an appointment to see Dr. / Gray.

items.line_en: Of course. Please take a seat, Mr. Burke.

coach.say: Of course. Please take a seat, Mr. Burke.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Of course. / Please take a seat, / Mr. / Burke.

items.line_en: The doctor will see you soon.

coach.say: The doctor will see you soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The doctor will see you soon.

items.line_en: Mr. Burke. The doctor will see you now.

coach.say: Mr. Burke. The doctor will see you now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Mr. / Burke. / The doctor will see you now.

items.line_en: Great. Thanks.

coach.say: Great. Thanks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great. / Thanks.

items.line_en: What seems to be the trouble, Mr. Burke?

coach.say: What seems to be the trouble, Mr. Burke?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What seems to be the trouble, / Mr. / Burke?

items.line_en: I feel terrible.

coach.say: I feel terrible.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I feel terrible.

items.line_en: My body aches. I have a running nose and a bad cough.

coach.say: My body aches. I have a running nose and a bad cough.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My body aches. / I have a running nose and a bad cough.

items.line_en: I see.

coach.say: I see.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I see.

items.line_en: Yes. Your temperature is very high too.

coach.say: Yes. Your temperature is very high too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes. / Your temperature is very high too.

items.line_en: You have a fever.

coach.say: You have a fever.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You have a fever.

items.line_en: It looks like you have the flu.

coach.say: It looks like you have the flu.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It looks like you have the flu.

items.line_en: Do you have any allergies?

coach.say: Do you have any allergies?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you have any allergies?

items.line_en: I don't think so.

coach.say: I don't think so.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't think so / .

items.line_en: Okay. Great.

coach.say: Okay. Great.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. / Great.

items.line_en: I'm going to prescribe some medicine.

coach.say: I'm going to prescribe some medicine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm going to prescribe some medicine.

items.line_en: Please take it twice every day.

coach.say: Please take it twice every day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please take it twice every day.

items.line_en: Once in the morning.

coach.say: Once in the morning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Once in the morning.

items.line_en: And once before bed.

coach.say: And once before bed.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And once before bed.

items.line_en: You should feel better in a few days.

coach.say: You should feel better in a few days.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You should feel better in a few days.

items.line_en: Great. Thank you.

coach.say: Great. Thank you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Great. / Thank you.
